summary: Plan-only remediation classification for five open PR inventory candidates using the provided preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are planned directly by this worker.

actions.reason: Useful small contributor PR, but it is not merge-ready because proof failed and review-bot findings are unresolved. Repair is narrow and branch is editable.
This is the clearest mergeable candidate in the shard: focused diff, proof passing, resolved bot feedback, clean security signal, and prior closed PR explicitly superseded by it.
Contributor path should remain canonical for this narrow fix, but merge is blocked by failed real-behavior proof and latest review status requiring changes.
The patch is useful and narrow, but unresolved review feedback plus an uneditable branch update blocker make a replacement or fresh maintainer fix path safer than merge.

Broad gateway availability work with current failing required checks is outside safe automated merge or replacement planning in this shard; maintainer judgment is needed on scope and whether to continue repairing this branch.

needs_human: #81108 broad XL gateway availability change has failing check-lint and check-prod-types and requires maintainer scope judgment before merge or repair finalization.
